Dialog.name: MSG_OPERATION_START
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10000 0 0}There should be a monorail about 200 meters ahead from where you are now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10001 0 0}Get there as quickly as you can. We don't want any passengers to get hurt.[n]{f 1 1}
